chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 766 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلصَّلاَةِ فِي اَلْقَلَنْسُوَةِ اَلسَّوْدَاءِ فَقَالَ «لاَ تُصَلِّ فِيهَا فَإِنَّهَا لِبَاسُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.766 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about praying while wearing a black cap.
Imam (as) said: "Do not pray in it, for it is the attire of the people of the Fire”.
